BreakpointDefinition.description: Viewport breakpoint for responsive layout; referenced by id in layout nodes (visibleFrom, hiddenFrom).

id.description: Breakpoint identifier (e.g. small, medium, large, xlarge).

minWidth.description: Min viewport width in px. Omit or 0 for smallest breakpoint.

maxWidth.description: Max viewport width in px. Omit for largest breakpoint (no max).
